statement: rulesync independently commoditises the same author-once -> multi-target generation across 30+ agents including Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code and Codex, with import/export and high release cadence.

evidence.quote: Node.js CLI tool that generates configuration files for AI development tools from unified rule files... supports 30+ agents... 242 releases, v8.23.0 (May 2026), MIT.
Write your rules... once in .ai-rulez/ then generate native configs for Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini, Codex and more.

falsifier: Evidence rulesync's generate command does not actually produce per-agent native configs, or that it dropped Codex/Copilot support.
